title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Nigeria, you can't sell digital products on Gumroad or Payhip due to payment restrictions. PayPal is limited in many countries, including Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, and Iran. Now, you're left wondering how to monetize your work without a traditional payment processor. Welcome to the world of crypto-native infrastructure, where NOWPayments offers a seamless payment experience across 300+ coins. Let's cut through the noise and explore your real options for selling plugins without a payment processor.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal alternatives like Stripe and Gumroad promise ease of use, but they often come with restrictions on restricted countries. PayPal itself is not available in many countries. Meanwhile, NOWPayments empowers developers with a fully automated, no-KYC payment processor. Its integration with the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) means you can sell digital products without worrying about country restrictions or payment processor account requirements. This infrastructure provides a permanent structural alternative to traditional payment processors.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip typically block payments or require complicated workarounds. NOWPayments takes a more inclusive approach, allowing you to sell digital products with no country restrictions and no payment processor account required. This means you can focus on your craft without worrying about your buyers' locations. By using NOWPayments, you unlock a broader market and increased revenue potential.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad charge fees ranging from 2.9% to 4.5% per transaction, with additional fees for international transactions. NOWPayments, on the other hand, charges a flat 0.9% transaction fee, making it an attractive option for creators looking to maximize their revenue. With NOWPayments, you also get instant automated delivery and no payment processor account required, saving you time and effort in the long run.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Traditional payment processors often require manual intervention, which can lead to delays and errors. NOWPayments, however, offers instant automated delivery, ensuring your buyers receive their products immediately after payment. This seamless experience not only boosts customer satisfaction but also helps you build trust and loyalty with your audience. By automating delivery, you can focus on creating more value for your buyers.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between traditional payment processors and NOWPayments depends on your specific needs and goals. If you're looking for a permanent structural alternative that empowers you to sell digital products without country restrictions, NOWPayments is the clear winner. Its seamless integration with the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) makes it an attractive option for creators seeking to maximize their revenue and growth potential.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
